html:
Exclusive to:

GenericUnclaimedOwn body

“NICE HARDWARE”

–wx78, when examining a body without an owner.

“PATHETIC FLESHLINGS, BOUND TO THEIR ORGANIC FORM”

–wx78, when examining their own body.

“A backup chassis for WX-78 to store items, circuits. WX-78 can transfer their consciousness into the chassis.”

-

The Backup Chassis is a Character-specific Item craftable only by WX-78 in Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted in WX-78's Survivor Items Filter after unlocking Cold Standby I in their Skill Tree. It requires a Gear and a Red Gem to craft.

A placed Backup Chassis has its own stats, inventory, circuit bars, and charge meters. The WX-78 player who placed the Backup Chassis can interact with it to transfer their consciousness into it, switching over to the Backup Chassis's inventory and circuits.

By default, each WX-78 player can only place a single Backup Chassis at a time in each shard (having a pre-built Backup Chassis will count towards the limit). Unlocking the Cold Standby II and III skills allows WX-78 to have up to two and three Backup Chassis at once, respectively.

Hammering Backup Chassis will drop items in its inventory and all the circuits, but will not drop its crafting ingredients.

Contents

  • 1 Skill Tree
    • 1.1 Inhabited Machine I
    • 1.2 Cold Standby II and III
    • 1.3 Remote Transfer
    • 1.4 Warm Standby
    • 1.5 Inhabited Machine II
    • 1.6 Inhabited Machine III
    • 1.7 Lunar Vessel
    • 1.8 Shadow Servitor
  • 2 Trivia

Skill Tree

Inhabited Machine I

WX-78's ghost can haunt a Backup Chassis to revive, similarly to haunting a Life Giving Amulet. Reviving into the Backup Chassis depletes its charge completely.

Cold Standby II and III

Increase the cap of Backup Chassis craft to 2 (or 3).

Remote Transfer

Using the map, WX-78 can transfer their consciousness to any of their Backup Chassis in that shard.

Warm Standby

Backup Chassis with Beta circuits plugged in will keep those circuits' effects active (e.g. a Backup Chassis with an Illumination Circuit plugged in will produce light).

Note that Acceleration, Electrification, and Optoelectronic Circuit are not affected by this skill, since their benefits only apply when WX-78 is controlling their body. Rangebooster Circuit (with Beta Tinkering I) only works with the Auto-Grabber when in uninhabited form.

Inhabited Machine II

If WX-78 dies with full charge and hasn't reached their limit on Backup Chassis, they will not leave a Skeleton behind or drop their inventory. Instead, their dead body transforms into a new Backup Chassis with all items intact, allowing WX-78 to immediately revive at the cost of charge and health.

Note that if the Backup Chassis was pre-crafted, it will counts the maximum count of Chassis available, which may not initiate the ability if it reaches the limit.

Inhabited Machine III

When WX-78 revives using a Backup Chassis, they revive with full health.

Lunar Vessel

WX-78 learns to craft the Spectral Transfer Module.

The Spectral Transfer Module can be put on Backup Chassis that belongs to player. A nearby Gestalts will possess it or when the player put an Encapsulated Gestalt in it. After possession, it will drop out the module, making it reusable.

The chassis will become Possessed Chassis and will follow WX-78, which will carry the effect of any circuits that have been plugged in, even with insufficient charges. Circuits tinkering skills also affect them.

The chassis can hold weapons, wear armors, and consume food that was feed or given by the player. It only deals 25% damage of any shadow weapons and 50% damage of any other weapon, including Planar Damage, but also consume half the durability of the items. It will switch to any highest damage/range weapon when fighting and tools when working.

WX-78 can also open the Possessed Chassis inventory.

If the chassis was possessed by the Gestalt from the Lunar Rift (i.e Grazer or Incursive Gestalts), it will receive Planar Entity Protection, and deals the normal Planar damage instead of half.

The Possessed Chassis have a 50% resistance to negative sanity aura (75% with Planar possessed one).

When WX-78 moves to another shards or leave the server, the chassis goes temporally into uninhabited form, reactivating itself when the player gets back. The chassis goes fully back to it uninhabited form if the player either dies or when the chassis dies, force hit by the player or reach 0 Sanity. Another module installed is needed to possess it again.

WX-78 and their Possessed Chassis gain +10% damage against Shadow Aligned creatures and +10% damage protection against Lunar Aligned creatures.

Shadow Servitor

WX Chassis with implants. From left to right: Shadow Atrium, Possessed Shadow Atrium, No implant.

WX-78 can "Implant" certain Shadow items into their unique circuitry slots, granting them with some special abilities. When implant a Nightmare Fuel, WX-78 unlocks the Auto-Grabber recipe, a drone which assist in picking up and harvesting items when WX-78 is picking stuff up, similar to the Lazy Forager. With Pure Horror, WX-78 can craft 4 instead of 2.

When in uninhabited states, the Auto-Grabbers of that chassis will continue to harvest and pick up items.

When implant a Shadow Atrium, WX-78 unlocks the Exploiterator recipe, a drone which inflict debuff by scanning the enemies weakness. Each drone when scanning the target grants WX-78 a 6% Physical Damage buff. With the Possessed Shadow Atrium implanted, WX-78 can craft 4 instead of 3 (results in a maximum of 24% damage increase). Also, the Chassis will periodically grow Shadow Atrium Tendrils around itself, which can be chopped for biome-dependent loot similar to that from Boulderbough.

With the Possessed Shadow Atrium imbued, the chassis produces Mimicreeps that will copy nearby items on the ground. When transferring consciousness to the chassis, all existing Shadow Atrium Tendril and Mimicreeps will despawn.

Trivia

  • Backup Chassis is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.

“Practical immortality through engineering!”
–Wilson, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“WX is always leaving their junk around.”
–Willow, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“Wolfgang only need one mighty body.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“Does this mean WX has a soul?”
–Wendy, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“ARE YOU THERE, %s? YOU'RE SUCH A GOOD LISTENER”
–WX-78, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“One of WX's backup chassis.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“It just sits there.”
–Woodie, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“WX! Someone could stub their toe on you!”
–Maxwell, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“Like a new suit öf armör, the metal warriör may simply dön a fresh bödy!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“Hello? Anybody home?”
–Webber, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“Bonjour? WX?”
–Warly, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“No friend inside.”
–Wormwood, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“Well, if it ain't a bucket of bolts.”
–Winona, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“No fair! Spare hardware!”
–Wortox, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“No folk in Ironfolk.”
–Wurt, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“That WX is full of surprises!”
–Walter, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“That WX is ahead of their time.”
–Wanda, when examining a body owned by somebody else.
“NICE HARDWARE”
–wx78, when examining a body without an owner.
“PATHETIC FLESHLINGS, BOUND TO THEIR ORGANIC FORM”
–wx78, when examining their own body.
“A backup chassis for WX-78 to store items, circuits. WX-78 can transfer their consciousness into the chassis.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Khung Xe Dự Phòng là một Vật Phẩm dành riêng cho Nhân Vật chỉ có thể chế tạo được bởi WX-78 trong Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ lọc vật phẩm sống sót của WX-78 sau khi mở khóa Cold Standby I trong Cây kỹ năng của họ. Nó yêu cầu Gear và Red Gem để chế tạo.

{{Scrapbook Info|A backup chassis for WX-78 to store items, circuits. WX-78 can transfer their consciousness into the chassis.}}

The '''Backup Chassis''' is a [[Character]]-specific [[Item]] craftable only by [[WX-78/Don't Starve Together|WX-78]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted in WX-78's [[Survivor Items Filter]] after unlocking [[Cold Standby I]] in their [[Insight|Skill Tree]]. It requires a [[Gears/DST|Gear]] and a [[Red Gem/DST|Red Gem]] to craft. 

A placed Backup Chassis has its own stats, inventory, [[Circuits|circuit bars]], and charge meters. The WX-78 player who placed the Backup Chassis can interact with it to transfer their consciousness into it, switching over to the Backup Chassis's inventory and circuits. 

By default, each WX-78 player can only place a single Backup Chassis at a time in each [[Shard|shard]] (having a pre-built Backup Chassis will count towards the limit). Unlocking the Cold Standby II and III skills allows WX-78 to have up to two and three Backup Chassis at once, respectively.

Hammering Backup Chassis will drop items in its inventory and all the circuits, but will not drop its crafting ingredients.

== Skill Tree ==
==={{PicDark|32|Inhabited Machine I}} Inhabited Machine I===
WX-78's [[Ghost Characters|ghost]] can [[Haunt|haunt]] a Backup Chassis to revive, similarly to haunting a [[Life Giving Amulet/DST|Life Giving Amulet]]. Reviving into the Backup Chassis depletes its charge completely.

=== {{PicDark|32|Cold Standby II}} Cold Standby II and III ===
Increase the cap of Backup Chassis craft to 2 (or 3).

==={{PicDark|32|Remote Transfer}} Remote Transfer===
Using the map, WX-78 can transfer their consciousness to any of their Backup Chassis in that shard. 

==={{PicDark|32|Warm Standby}} Warm Standby===
Backup Chassis with Beta circuits plugged in will keep those circuits' effects active (e.g. a Backup Chassis with an [[Illumination Circuit]] plugged in will produce light). 

Note that [[Acceleration Circuit|Acceleration]], [[Electrification Circuit|Electrification]], and [[Optoelectronic Circuit]] are not affected by this skill, since their benefits only apply when WX-78 is controlling their body. [[Rangebooster Circuit]] (with Beta Tinkering I) only works with the Auto-Grabber when in uninhabited form.

==={{PicDark|32|Inhabited Machine II}} Inhabited Machine II===
If WX-78 dies with full charge and hasn't reached their limit on Backup Chassis, they will not leave a [[Skeleton/DST|Skeleton]] behind or drop their inventory. Instead, their dead body transforms into a new Backup Chassis with all items intact, allowing WX-78 to immediately revive at the cost of charge and health.

Note that if the Backup Chassis was pre-crafted, it will counts the maximum count of Chassis available, which may not initiate the ability if it reaches the limit.

==={{PicDark|32|Inhabited Machine III}} Inhabited Machine III===
When WX-78 revives using a Backup Chassis, they revive with full health.

==={{PicDark|32|Lunar Vessel}} Lunar Vessel===
WX-78 learns to craft the [[Spectral Transfer Module]].

The Spectral Transfer Module can be put on Backup Chassis that belongs to player. A nearby Gestalts will possess it or when the player put an [[Phasmo-Encapsulator#Encapsulated Gestalts|Encapsulated Gestalt]] in it. After possession, it will drop out the module, making it reusable.

The chassis will become [[Possessed Chassis]] and will follow WX-78, which will carry the effect of any circuits that have been plugged in, even with insufficient charges. Circuits tinkering skills also affect them.

The chassis can hold weapons, wear armors, and consume food that was feed or given by the player. It only deals 25% damage of any shadow weapons and 50% damage of any other weapon, including [[Planar Damage]], but also consume half the durability of the items. It will switch to any highest damage/range weapon when fighting and tools when working.

WX-78 can also open the Possessed Chassis inventory.

If the chassis was possessed by the Gestalt from the Lunar Rift (i.e [[Grazer]] or [[Incursive Gestalt]]s), it will receive [[Planar Entity Protection]], and deals the normal Planar damage instead of half.

The Possessed Chassis have a 50% resistance to negative sanity aura (75% with Planar possessed one).

When WX-78 moves to another shards or leave the server, the chassis goes temporally into uninhabited form, reactivating itself when the player gets back. The chassis goes fully back to it uninhabited form if the player either dies or when the chassis dies, force hit by the player or reach 0 Sanity. Another module installed is needed to possess it again.

WX-78 and their Possessed Chassis gain +10% damage against [[Shadow Aligned]] creatures and +10% damage protection against [[Lunar Aligned]] creatures.

==={{PicDark|32|Shadow Servitor}} Shadow Servitor===
[[File:WX Chassis With Hearts.png|thumb|300px|right|WX Chassis with implants. From left to right: Shadow Atrium, Possessed Shadow Atrium, No implant.]]

WX-78 can "Implant" certain Shadow items into their unique circuitry slots, granting them with some special abilities. When implant a [[Nightmare Fuel/DST|Nightmare Fuel]], WX-78 unlocks the [[Auto-Grabber]] recipe, a drone which assist in picking up and harvesting items when WX-78 is picking stuff up, similar to the Lazy Forager. With [[Pure Horror]], WX-78 can craft 4 instead of 2.

When in uninhabited states, the Auto-Grabbers of that chassis will continue to harvest and pick up items. 

When implant a [[Shadow Atrium]], WX-78 unlocks the [[Exploiterator]] recipe, a drone which inflict debuff by scanning the enemies weakness. Each drone when scanning the target grants WX-78 a 6% Physical Damage buff. With the [[Possessed Shadow Atrium]] implanted, WX-78 can craft 4 instead of 3 (results in a maximum of 24% damage increase). Also, the Chassis will periodically grow [[Shadow Atrium Tendril]]s around itself, which can be chopped for biome-dependent loot similar to that from [[Boulderbough#Drops|Boulderbough]]. 

With the Possessed Shadow Atrium imbued, the chassis produces [[Mimicreep]]s that will copy nearby items on the ground. When transferring consciousness to the chassis, all existing Shadow Atrium Tendril and Mimicreeps will despawn.

== {{Trivia}} Trivia ==
* Backup Chassis is added in [[WX-78 Skill Spotlight]] update.
